plugins.name: design-doc
plugins.description: Turn a requirement into a verifiable, implementation-ready detailed design document (SDD). Interrogates ambiguity first, then produces a design contract.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: House conventions and template for writing, improving, and reviewing Claude Code skills, plus this marketplace's registration flow (marketplace.json entry, version bump, local dedup).

plugins.name: flutter-dart-code-review
plugins.description: Library-agnostic Flutter/Dart code review checklist: widget best practices, state management, Dart idioms, performance, accessibility, security, clean architecture.

plugins.name: claude-md-hygiene
plugins.description: Audit or rewrite a project's agent-facing CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md so it stays stable norms + landmines only — push volatile status/todos/contract/design detail out to living docs, keep only invariants + pointers, and grep-verify every referenced symbol still exists.

plugins.name: sdd-harness-init
plugins.description: Scaffold the decision-log drift-guard SDD harness into a repo — create docs/design/DECISIONS.md, install a warn-only pre-commit that lists un-written-back decisions, wire git core.hooksPath, and inject a CLAUDE.md pointer section. Idempotent; the portable mechanism is contract-agnostic (writeback targets stay per-project).
